title: strophanthus gratus
intro: Strophanthus gratus, also known as the African heart, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular conditions, such as high blood pressure and congestive heart failure, due to its ability to slow the heart rate and improve cardiac function. The health benefits of Strophanthus gratus include reducing symptoms of angina, lowering blood pressure, and improving overall cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to promote cardiovascular well-being.
